case_title: JESUS HUMBERTO CARTAGENA VS. TAYLOR AZEVEDO MAIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARTAGENA, JESUS HUMBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT MAIA, TAYLOR AZEVEDO AKA TAYLOR MAIA, AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARTAGENA, JESUS HUMBERTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAIA, TAYLOR AZEVEDO AKA TAYLOR MAIA, AN INDIVIDUAL $20,746.85 PRINCIPAL, $3,962.39 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,079.24, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
